title: gabe1cragger's Golden Bread
body:
This mod does one thing: it adds golden bread, a variant of bread crafted with 8 gold nuggets around a bread. Golden bread functions identically to the golden carrot, however with _slightly_ better food values.

I made this because I wanted golden bread in my world. If you also want golden bread in your world, this mod is the perfect mod for you.

The AppleSkin edition has its values tweaked because I encountered a bug when using Golden Bread with AppleSkin. You don't _need_ to use the AppleSkin edition with AppleSkin, nor do you _need_ to use AppleSkin with the AppleSkin edition, but both are highly recommended simply for quality of life.
